tasks.command: echo 'resolving deps…'; sleep 0.8; echo '✓ build ok (12 modules)'
echo 'starting test runner…'; for s in unit integration e2e api; do sleep 0.9; echo "  ✓ $s suite passed"; done; echo '✓ 4 suites green'
echo 'linting 42 files…'; sleep 1.1; echo '  style: clean'; sleep 0.8; echo '✓ no issues'
sleep 0.4; echo '✓ all green — report published'
